use_cases: Display animated targeting reticle overlays in game-like interfaces or media applications
Add HUD-style visual elements to creative project demonstrations
Create targeting system visuals for shooter or strategy game UI mockups
ai_summary: An animated SVG-based HUD targeting reticle component with Framer Motion animations for opacity fade-ins. Features theme-aware color switching between light and dark modes. Renders a minimalist crosshair/targeting pattern suitable for game interfaces, video overlays, or creative media applications.
